user.title: Supply Manager
user.description: Set up Supply Manager to track your supplies, stock levels, and consumption.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one instance of Supply Manager is allowed.

add_supply.name: Add Supply
add_supply.description: Add a new supply item to track.

name.name: Name
name.description: Name of the supply item (e.g., 'Ibuprofen', 'Rice', 'Bottled Water').

category.name: Category
category.description: Category of the supply (medicine, food, water, cleaning, hygiene, other).

unit.name: Unit
unit.description: Unit of measurement (pcs, L, kg, g, mL, packs, boxes, bottles, tablets, rolls).

min_threshold.name: Minimum Threshold
min_threshold.description: Minimum quantity before low stock alert is triggered.

location.name: Location
location.description: Where the supply is stored (e.g., 'Kitchen Cabinet', 'Bathroom').

update_stock.name: Update Stock
update_stock.description: Update the stock quantity of an existing supply.

supply_id.name: Supply ID
supply_id.description: The unique ID of the supply to update.

log_consumption.name: Log Consumption
log_consumption.description: Log consumption of a supply item.

supply_id.name: Supply ID
supply_id.description: The unique ID of the supply consumed.

remove_supply.name: Remove Supply
remove_supply.description: Remove a supply item from tracking.

supply_id.name: Supply ID
supply_id.description: The unique ID of the supply to remove.

get_low_stock.name: Get Low Stock
get_low_stock.description: Get all supplies that are at or below their minimum threshold.

get_supply_history.name: Get Supply History
get_supply_history.description: Get the storage operation history for supplies.

start_date.name: Start Date
start_date.description: Filter by start date (ISO format, optional).

end_date.name: End Date
end_date.description: Filter by end date (ISO format, optional).

limit.name: Limit
limit.description: Maximum number of entries to return.

get_consumption_log.name: Get Consumption Log
get_consumption_log.description: Get the consumption log for supplies.

start_date.name: Start Date
start_date.description: Filter by start date (ISO format, optional).

end_date.name: End Date
end_date.description: Filter by end date (ISO format, optional).

limit.name: Limit
limit.description: Maximum number of entries to return.
